_comment: An undeclared vendored bootstrap.min.css is a third-party CSS library and must be flagged by missing-library, exactly like a bundled .min.js would be (the regression: classifyBundled used to skip non-JS files). The classifier recognizes it by the .min.css name, the 'bootstrap' stem, the '/*!' banner and the minified geometry. --checks-only isolates the finding so the golden tracks only the CSS detection.
